Cities worldwide
One global community

Austin is one of 55+ chapters worldwide.

We're the Austin chapter of Founders Running Club — a global movement of 50,000+ members across 40 countries and 5 continents. Each week, 1,000+ founders show up to run and connect in cities like San Francisco, New York, London, Dubai, Singapore, Paris and São Paulo. Here in Austin, we bring that same energy to Lady Bird Lake.

What we do

More than a Saturday run.

FRC Austin curates events and communities for founders, operators and investors — spaces to build real relationships, find help and grow what you're working on.

Curated events
Founder-focused events, dinners and meetups for founders, operators and investors across Austin.
Co-working
Find people to co-work with around ATX — focus, accountability and good company.
Join the group →
Event buddies
A group to find friends to head to Austin events together — never go alone.
Join the group →
Founders Helping Founders
Ask for intros, advice and a hand from people who've been exactly where you are.
Join the group →
Free tax help
Free tax & accounting guidance from our partners at GoGlobal World.
Join the group →
How Saturdays work

One simple ritual, every week.

Show up at 8:00 AM. No experience required — walkers, joggers and runners all welcome. The route is flat and scenic, and nobody gets left behind.

01
Meet & intros
Gather at the Edward Rendon Park Estacionamiento. Quick round of introductions — who you are, what you're building.
8:00 AM
02
Warm up
A short group warm-up to loosen up before we head out along the trail.
~8:10 AM
03
Walk / Run
Pick your distance and go at your own pace. Conversations happen on the move — this is where the magic is.
~8:15 AM
04
Coffee & chat
Regroup at Afuga Coffee to refuel, keep talking and make new connections.
~9:00 AM
2 miles · easy
5K · 3.1 miles
10K · 6.2 miles
Where we meet

Lady Bird Lake, every Saturday.

The start line

Edward Rendon Park Estacionamiento (I-35 & Lady Bird Trail on the East Side)

We meet at the Edward Rendon Park Estacionamiento (I-35 & Lady Bird Trail on the East Side), right on the eastern shore of Lady Bird Lake. Flat, scenic trails and easy parking — look for the FRC crew near the lot at 8:00 AM sharp.

Get directions →

The coffee spot

Afuga Coffee · ~9:00 AM

After the run we regroup at Afuga Coffee — a few minutes from the park — for coffee, breakfast and the conversations that turn a run into a community. Everyone's welcome, whether you ran the 10K or walked the 2 miles.

Find Afuga →
The people in the room

Builders, operators & investors.

Our Saturday runs draw founders from across Austin's startup ecosystem and beyond. Members currently build at — and have previously worked at — companies like these.

Partner with us

Become a sponsor.

Put your brand in front of a high-signal community of founders, operators and investors in Austin — and across 55+ cities globally. Tell us what you're looking to do, and we'll send over partnership options.

Partner with FRC Austin

We work with partners who want to support founders — from the run, to the back office, to the world beyond Austin. FRC Austin is part of a global community of 50,000+ members across 55+ cities.

Prefer to reach the global community directly? Email hello@foundersrc.com.

See you
Saturday.

8:00 AM at the Edward Rendon Park Estacionamiento (I-35 & Lady Bird Trail on the East Side). Bring your shoes, your ideas and an open mind. First run's on us — every run is, actually.
